title: Databricks Genie app in Microsoft Teams is now in Public Preview
body: The Databricks Genie app in Microsoft Teams is now in [Public Preview](/aws/en/release-notes/release-types). The app brings Genie into Microsoft Teams so users can ask data questions and get answers without leaving Microsoft Teams. See [Databricks Genie app in Microsoft Teams](/aws/en/integrations/msft-teams).

ref_links.text: Databricks Genie app in Microsoft Teams
